fault_hypothesis: The `overlaps` function on line 68 incorrectly uses non-strict inequalities (`<=`, `>=`), causing it to fail to detect an overlap when two bands are adjacent (i.e., touching at a boundary). The logic should use strict inequalities (`<`, `>`) for the non-overlap check.

At the end of each loop iteration, if the loop continues, the candidate must not overlap the current slot, including at the boundaries.
